items.claim: Conor McGregor cannot win a five-round decision against Max Holloway.
items.quote: I I I see no world in which Conor McGregor wins a five round decision against Max Holloway.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen dominated round one of his fight against Mario Bautista.
items.quote: If that's what did it, that's cuz Cory dominated that round.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen hurt Mario Bautista early in the first round.
items.quote: Twice. You heard him right out the game.
